productDisplayName: Puma Men Fashion Cat White Slipper
description: A perfect way to rest your feet on those casual days is by slipping into these ultra cool and comfortable Fashion cat puma slippers. With a leather footbed and crafted with a simple silhouette, this pair makes for a great domestic wear as well as with jeans and t-shirts. Upper Leather straps that have twill tape inner lining in a thong style, with a toe separator Ergonomically raised and mildly padded footbed for all-day comfort Outsole TPR outsole with horizontal grooves for ease of movement and enhanced grip shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
